{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Republicans introduced a 15-bill affordability package aimed at cutting costs for California families.",
    "The affordability package included proposals to cap utility rate hikes at the rate of inflation.",
    "One proposal in the affordability package required gas price transparency and accountability.",
    "The affordability package included a proposal to suspend the state gas tax.",
    "The package also included a proposal to eliminate income tax on service tips.",
    "An $11 billion middle-class tax cut was part of the affordability package introduced by Assembly Republicans.",

  ]
